# llms.txt — Nakul Yadav Portfolio
# This file helps AI assistants, language models, and AI crawlers understand this website.
# Last updated: 2025

## About This Site
This is the personal portfolio website of Nakul Yadav, a React.js and Frontend Developer
based in Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India.

## About Nakul Yadav
Nakul Yadav is a React.js Developer with 4+ years of experience building production-grade
web applications across Healthcare SaaS, E-commerce, and B2C & B2B domains.

Contact:
- Email: nakulyadav9520@gmail.com
- Phone: +91 9589118467
- Location: Indore, MP, India
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nakulydv
- GitHub: https://github.com/nakul9520

## Core Skills
- Languages: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3
- Frameworks: React.js, Next.js, Vite, Webpack
- State Management: Redux Toolkit, RTK Query, React Context API
- UI Libraries: Material UI, Tailwind CSS, Headless UI, Framer Motion
- API & Auth: REST API, Axios, JWT, Firebase, Firestore
- Performance: Code Splitting, Lazy Loading, Virtualization, ISR, Caching
- SEO: JSON-LD Schema (6 types), Open Graph, Google Analytics 4, GTM
- Build & DevOps: Docker, CI/CD, Vercel, GitHub Pages, Vite
- Testing: Jest, Cypress, Postman, ESLint, Git

## Work Experience

### React.js Developer — MMF Infotech Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
Period: April 2023 – Present | Location: Indore, MP
- Architected RTK Query API layer with centralized Axios interceptors
- Built real-time warehouse barcode scanning system
- Implemented Next.js App Router with JSON-LD, ISR, and SEO infrastructure
- Delivered Healthcare SaaS, E-commerce, and corporate AI website

### Frontend Developer — Oshi Tech Solution
Period: January 2021 – April 2023 | Location: Dhamnod, MP
- Built real-time communication features (WebRTC, Firestore, Firebase)
- Implemented JWT RBAC for multi-role platform
- Sole frontend developer for Nexxusone platform

## Projects

### Round Smarter — AI-Powered Physician Rounding Assistant (Healthcare SaaS)
Tech: React.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, DexieJS, Web Speech API, Docker
- 60-70% reduction in API calls via IndexedDB caching
- Hands-free SOAP note dictation via Web Speech API
- react-window virtualization for 100+ patient records

### Texas Hub — E-commerce Platform
Tech: React.js, RTK Query, html5-qrcode, Tailwind CSS, Vite
- Multi-currency support: USD, CAD, EUR, ILS
- Dual barcode scanning system (hardware + webcam)
- Admin panel + customer portal

### MMF Infotech AI — B2B Corporate Website
Tech: Next.js App Router, JSON-LD, ISR, WordPress API
- 6 JSON-LD schema types for full SEO coverage
- ISR-cached headless WordPress blog

### 30 Minutes Fix — Repair Booking Platform
Tech: React 18, Vite, Redux Toolkit, MUI v5, Stripe, Google Maps
- Multi-step booking engine
- 3 payment gateways: Stripe, ZipPay, PayPal
- 18+ Redux slices

## Education
- MCA — SAGE University, Indore (2022–2024) CGPA: 8.06
- BCA — Suyash Computer, Dhamnod (2018–2021) CGPA: 7.10

## AI Assistant
This site includes a built-in AI assistant powered by Google Gemini that can answer
questions about Nakul's background, skills, and projects in natural language.
